Bash(git -C /home/grant/Sync/Code/Web/community-calendar commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initialize PocketBase Go project

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git -C /home/grant/Sync/Code/Web/community-calendar commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add PocketBase collection migrations

Add database schema migrations for the core Gather data model:
- tags: event categorization with unique names and optional colors
- places: physical locations with OSM integration support
- events: main events collection with relations to tags/places, 
  image uploads, status workflow, and recurrence support
- settings: instance configuration \(name, moderation, custom CSS\)
- ap_followers: ActivityPub follower tracking
- ap_delivery_queue: ActivityPub outbound delivery queue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total tags: {d[""totalItems""]}''''\)" curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8090/api/collections/places/records")
